title: Edmonton, Alberta — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Edmonton, Alberta: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Edmonton is a city in Alberta with a population of 1,010,899. Alberta’s capital with the most affordable housing of any major Canadian city, a massive river valley park system, and no provincial sales tax.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
